query:
SELECT vc.id, vc.name, vc.role, vc.enableLipSync, vc.isLocked, vc.lockedDescription, 
       vc.masterPortraitUrl, vc.characterPrompt, vc.lockedOutfit, vc.lockedRole,
       vc.isRealPerson, vc.characterMode, vc.slotIndex,
       (SELECT vcp.photoUrl FROM videoCharacterPhotos vcp WHERE vcp.characterId = vc.id LIMIT 1) as primaryPhotoUrl
FROM videoCharacters vc
WHERE vc.jobId = 510099
ORDER BY vc.slotIndex;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT vc.id, vc.name, vc.role, vc.enableLipSync, vc.isLocked, vc.lockedDescription, 
       vc.masterPortraitUrl, vc.characterPrompt, vc.lockedOutfit, vc.lockedRole,
       vc.isRealPerson, vc.characterMode, vc.slotIndex,
       (SELECT vcp.photoUrl FROM videoCharacterPhotos vcp WHERE vcp.characterId = vc.id LIMIT 1) as primaryPhotoUrl
FROM videoCharacters vc
WHERE vc.jobId = 510099
ORDER BY vc.slotIndex;

rows.name: Zara
rows.lockedDescription: A full-length standing figure of Zara, a mixed-race British woman in her late 20s, with a very slim, narrow frame, lean physique, and slender build. Her warm medium-brown skin is natural, complementing her sharp cheekbones, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, and full lips. Her natural textured hair, shoulder-length, is worn loose. She holds a confident, direct gaze. She wears a form-fitting black leather jacket, layered gold necklaces, and several gold rings. Her lower half is clad in distressed dark-wash skinny jeans that accentuate her slender legs, narrow knees, and lean calves. She completes the look with black ankle boots, covering her feet and ankles, featuring a subtle heel. Her strong presence is effortlessly cool.
rows.lockedOutfit: {"jacket":"form-fitting black leather jacket","shirt":"unspecified shirt under jacket","trousers":"distressed dark-wash skinny jeans","shoes":"black ankle boots with subtle heel","accessories":"layered gold necklaces, several gold rings"}
